ValidationRule.description:
Post-Judgment –Writ_Garnishment_Payment
Following fields become mandatory and remain editable Garnishment number Garnishment Date Garnishment Amount Number of payments
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND( ISPICKVAL( Legal_Status__c ,'Post-Judgment'), OR( ISPICKVAL( Legal_Sub_Status__c ,'Writ Filed'), ISPICKVAL( Legal_Sub_Status__c ,'Writ & Garnishment'),
ISPICKVAL( Legal_Sub_Status__c ,'Writ and Payment Arrangement') ), OR( ISBLANK( Writ_Amount__c ), ISBLANK( Writ_Number__c ), ISBLANK( Date_Writ_Issued__c ) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Following fields are mandatory Writ number, Writ Date, Writ Amount
